segments.text: Today is a very important day in our lives as Sahaja Yogis.
This was the Day when Sahasrara was opened out,
which really happened to be a charismatic thing that happened!
I never expected
That In my lifetime i will work it out
It has been
And so many of you have got your Sahastrara opened
Without that, you could never have known what is the truth.
You were all lost as everybody else was!
First of All Sahastrara is only way we can perceive understand and know the reality
You have come to know as to what is the reality, and you are enjoying that state where
it's a great blessing that Sahastrara was opened out
and all of you got your Realization.
Otherwise, All Talks are just talks
has no meaning
Has No Understanding
And that's why
My first anxiety was to open Sastra
That worked out
Worked Out Well
&all Of You have Got
Your Sastrara Open
It is a remarkable thing
Nobody can believe
That's so many of you have got your Sahasrara open, but I can see now clearly the light
on top off your heads.
Whatever that You've achieved is remarkable no doubt it because honest searching – Honest
Searching!
that you have got it. My doing is nothing, because You were just there like a lamp and
I just enlightened It." That's all!
Is not such big thing to do as
you people are achieved your state
the State of Enlightenment
That you got it because
You were hankering after
Working It out
And,you did
Its very creditable
Credit doesn't go to me I think
Because i had a open Swastrana
But To achieve that in you people
Was so Joy giving for Me
Now ,You will understand
Because if Sahastrara is not open, you can't talk people.
You cannot say anything to them – it's just they don´t understand with the Sahasrara
opened your understanding improves so much!
That was what has happened for all of us and I am very happy that there are
many people sitting here who have got their Sahasranas opened
and there are many who have not come, so it's a big achievement for human beings to get
Itso much collectively sastra rao opal by which you know the truth.
Absolute Truth whatever You Know after Your realization is The Absolute Truth.
You don't argue then, you just know it and accept as a knowledge.
It's such nice thing that was all there but not open when opened out how people have
understood Me also the laws of Divine.
It's such a blessing of the Divine that you have got your Sahastrara opened out, for which
You may say we didn't do anything other.
Is not so!
Your search or truth was intense and definite .You wanted to know The Truth ,that is why
it has workedout otherwise no amount money No amount effort nothing would have helped
Sahasrara had to open by itself.
It's all your building up, I should say it is all you are doing yourself that has brought
forth such a beautiful happening!
I do not take any credit for that, at all.
Definitely i must say
That have made you understand
It's important your Sahastrara should be opened
No more arguments
no more suggestions
Nothing but having your own Sahasrara open
Which tells what is the truth
In these beautiful circumstances, what could your mother say?
I can only that continue to live a life of reality.
Of understanding in everything you will find there is truth
and how do we use the truth
is our own achievement.
People are lost because they have no knowledge,
Knowledge from the books
Is No-Knowledge
Their knowledge must come
From within
From Within themselves
And that has happened
Because of Sahasrara opening
In all the countries
It Has Happened
and it will be in
The whole world
So many people will get Realization, but only thing I feel that you
People should have no emotional attachment to it.
Not Emotional! But realistic Attachment
That It is there
It has happened
Its working out
Then You'll be able
To give Realizations
to other will understand the importance of Realization, unless and until you use it.
You won't know what is power of realization is so we must learn how this power which
within you which has started working out and will give such an immense capacity.
My health is a little bit gone down after all, I am very old but still i don't feel
tired in any way while addressing You.
I feel so enamored that there are so many Sahaja Yogis,
who's Sastrara is open and they're enjoying their Sastra.
Actually i would have liked you to ask me questions
but if You can write question send Me written ones
then will try answer them sometime
it'll be a much better idea
So thankyou verymuch
May God bless you
Grow into surge, grow in to your being.
May God bless you all my blessings
